[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / min

# Method: min()

## Call Signature

```ts
min(...values): number;
```

Return the smallest value in a sequence.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| ...`values` | `number`[] | Values to compare. |

### Returns

`number`

Smallest value.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" encoded-files="W3siaW5mbyI6Imh0bWwgaW5kZXguaHRtbCBbaGlkZGVuXSBbcmVhZG9ubHldIiwiY29kZSI6IjwhRE9DVFlQRSBodG1sPlxuPGh0bWwgbGFuZz1cImVuXCI-XG4gIDxoZWFkPlxuICAgIDxtZXRhIGNoYXJzZXQ9XCJ1dGYtOFwiIC8-XG4gICAgPG1ldGEgbmFtZT1cInZpZXdwb3J0XCIgY29udGVudD1cIndpZHRoPWRldmljZS13aWR0aCwgaW5pdGlhbC1zY2FsZT0xXCIgLz5cbiAgICA8dGl0bGU-bWluPC90aXRsZT5cbiAgICA8c3R5bGU-_IDExMCA6IDIzMCk7XG5cdFx0dC5yZWN0KDEsIHQuYWJzKHZhbHVlc1tpXSkgKyAxKTtcblx0XHR0LnBvcCgpO1xuXHR9XG5cblx0dC5jaGFyKCctJyk7XG5cdHQuY2hhckNvbG9yKDI1NSwgMTYwLCAxMTApO1xuXHR0LmxpbmUoLTIzLCA2IC0gbG93LCAyMywgNiAtIGxvdyk7XG59KTtcblxubGFiZWxMYXllci5kcmF3KCgpID0--IHtcblx0dC5yZXNpemVDYW52YXMod2luZG93LmlubmVyV2lkdGgsIHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lckhlaWdodCk7XG59KTsifV0" />

## Call Signature

```ts
min(values): number;
```

Return the smallest value in an array.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `values` | readonly `number`[] | Values to compare. |

### Returns

`number`

Smallest value.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" encoded-files="W3siaW5mbyI6Imh0bWwgaW5kZXguaHRtbCBbaGlkZGVuXSBbcmVhZG9ubHldIiwiY29kZSI6IjwhRE9DVFlQRSBodG1sPlxuPGh0bWwgbGFuZz1cImVuXCI-XG4gIDxoZWFkPlxuICAgIDxtZXRhIGNoYXJzZXQ9XCJ1dGYtOFwiIC8-XG4gICAgPG1ldGEgbmFtZT1cInZpZXdwb3J0XCIgY29udGVudD1cIndpZHRoPWRldmljZS13aWR0aCwgaW5pdGlhbC1zY2FsZT0xXCIgLz5cbiAgICA8dGl0bGU-bWluPC90aXRsZT5cbiAgICA8c3R5bGU-_IDExMCA6IDIzMCk7XG5cdFx0dC5yZWN0KDEsIHQuYWJzKHZhbHVlc1tpXSkgKyAxKTtcblx0XHR0LnBvcCgpO1xuXHR9XG5cblx0dC5jaGFyKCctJyk7XG5cdHQuY2hhckNvbG9yKDI1NSwgMTYwLCAxMTApO1xuXHR0LmxpbmUoLTIzLCA2IC0gbG93LCAyMywgNiAtIGxvdyk7XG59KTtcblxubGFiZWxMYXllci5kcmF3KCgpID0--IHtcblx0dC5yZXNpemVDYW52YXMod2luZG93LmlubmVyV2lkdGgsIHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lckhlaWdodCk7XG59KTsifV0" />
